compiled_state.title: RED: Add behavioral tests for no_new_tests_needed output paths in red-test-writer
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Modify existing test file `tests/agents/test-red-test-writer.sh` to add test cases for both no_new_tests_needed exit paths.

### Steps
1. Add test case for green_classified path:
   - Create a task fixture with a description indicating testing_mode=GREEN (task modifies implementation without changing behavior)
   - Invoke the red-test-writer test harness with this fixture
   - Assert: output starts with TEST_RESULT:no_new_tests_needed, REASON field equals green_classified, exit code 0
2. Add test case for existing_coverage_sufficient path:
   - Create a task fixture with testing_mode=RED but where existing tests already cover the behavior
   - Include an existing test file path in the fixture context
   - Assert: output starts with TEST_RESULT:no_new_tests_needed, REASON field equals existing_coverage_sufficient, exit code 0
3. Add .test-index RED marker for the new test cases

### Test Approach
Tests invoke the red-test-writer test harness with controlled fixtures and assert on the structured output format and exit code. This is behavioral — it exercises the agent's decision logic rather than grepping source files.

### File Impact
- `tests/agents/test-red-test-writer.sh` — Edit (add 2 test cases)
- `.test-index` — Edit (add RED marker)

## Testing Mode
RED

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test case for green_classified exit path exists
  Verify: grep -q "green_classified" tests/agents/test-red-test-writer.sh
- [ ] Test case for existing_coverage_sufficient exit path exists
  Verify: grep -q "existing_coverage_sufficient" tests/agents/test-red-test-writer.sh
- [ ] RED marker in .test-index
  Verify: grep -q "\[no_new_tests" .test-index
- [ ] Tests FAIL against current red-test-writer (RED state)
  Verify: { bash tests/agents/test-red-test-writer.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAIL"; }

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Files read — test file has 10 existing structural tests; agent file lacks no_new_tests_needed format; contract defines green_classified and existing_coverage_sufficient REASON enum values ✓
